title: Memory Bear AI Memory Science Engine for Multimodal Affective Intelligence: A Technical Report
snippet:
arXiv:2603.22306v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Affective judgment in real interaction is rarely a purely local prediction problem. Emotional meaning often depends on prior trajectory, accumulated context, and multimodal evidence that may be weak, noisy, or incomplete at the current moment. Although multimodal emotion recognition (MER) has improved the integration of text, speech, and visual signals, many existing systems remain optimized for short-range inference and provide limited support for persistent affective memory, long-horizon dependency modeling, and robust interpretation under imperfect input.
  This technical report presents the Memory Bear AI Memory Science Engine, a memory-centered framework for multimodal affective intelligence. Instead of treating emotion as a transient output label, the framework models affective information as a structured and evolving variable within a memory system. It organizes processing through structured memory formation, working-memory aggregation, long-term consolidation, memory-driven retrieval, dynamic fusion calibration, and continuous memory updating. At its core, multimodal signals are transformed into structured Emotion Memory Units (EMUs), enabling affective information to be preserved, reactivated, and revised across interaction horizons.
  Experimental results show consistent gains over comparison systems across benchmark and business-grounded settings, with stronger accuracy and robustness, especially under noisy or missing-modality conditions. The framework offers a practical step from local emotion recognition toward more continuous, robust, and deployment-relevant affective intelligence.
ai_summary: 研究人员提出了一种基于记忆的多模态情感智能框架，将情感信息建模为记忆系统中可演化的结构化变量，而非瞬时标签。该框架通过形成情感记忆单元，支持信息的长期保存与动态更新。实验表明，其在噪声或模态缺失条件下具有更优的准确性与鲁棒性，推动了情感识别向持续、稳健的实用方向迈进。

title: The Efficiency Attenuation Phenomenon: A Computational Challenge to the Language of Thought Hypothesis
snippet:
arXiv:2603.22312v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: This paper computationally investigates whether thought requires a language-like format, as posited by the Language of Thought (LoT) hypothesis. We introduce the ``AI Private Language'' thought experiment: if two artificial agents develop an efficient, inscrutable communication protocol via multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), and their performance declines when forced to use a human-comprehensible language, this Efficiency Attenuation Phenomenon (EAP) challenges the LoT. We formalize this in a cooperative navigation task under partial observability. Results show that agents with an emergent protocol achieve 50.5\% higher efficiency than those using a pre-defined, human-like symbolic protocol, confirming the EAP. This suggests optimal collaborative cognition in these systems is not mediated by symbolic structures but is naturally coupled with sub-symbolic computations. The work bridges philosophy, cognitive science, and AI, arguing for pluralism in cognitive architectures and highlighting implications for AI ethics.
ai_summary: 一项最新研究通过人工智能实验对“思维语言假说”提出挑战。研究人员让两个AI智能体通过强化学习自主发展沟通协议，结果发现其协作效率比使用预设人类语言协议时高出50.5%。这表明高效协作认知可能无需符号化语言中介，而是通过亚符号计算实现。该研究融合哲学、认知科学与人工智能领域，为认知架构多元论提供了实证依据。

title: Dynamic Fusion-Aware Graph Convolutional Neural Network for Multimodal Emotion Recognition in Conversations
snippet:
arXiv:2603.22345v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition in conversations (MERC) aims to identify and understand the emotions expressed by speakers during utterance interaction from multiple modalities (e.g., text, audio, images, etc.). Existing studies have shown that GCN can improve the performance of MERC by modeling dependencies between speakers. However, existing methods usually use fixed parameters to process multimodal features for different emotion types, ignoring the dynamics of fusion between different modalities, which forces the model to balance performance between multiple emotion categories, thus limiting the model's performance on some specific emotions. To this end, we propose a dynamic fusion-aware graph convolutional neural network (DF-GCN) for robust recognition of multimodal emotion features in conversations. Specifically, DF-GCN integrates ordinary differential equations into graph convolutional networks (GCNs) to {capture} the dynamic nature of emotional dependencies within utterance interaction networks and leverages the prompts generated by the global information vector (GIV) of the utterance to guide the dynamic fusion of multimodal features. This allows our model to dynamically change parameters when processing each utterance feature, so that different network parameters can be equipped for different emotion categories in the inference stage, thereby achieving more flexible emotion classification and enhancing the generalization ability of the model. Comprehensive experiments conducted on two public multimodal conversational datasets {confirm} that the proposed DF-GCN model delivers superior performance, benefiting significantly from the dynamic fusion mechanism introduced.
ai_summary: 多模态对话情感识别（MERC）旨在通过文本、音频等多模态信息识别对话中的情感。现有方法常使用固定参数处理不同情感，限制了模型性能。为此，研究提出动态融合感知图卷积网络（DF-GCN），通过引入常微分方程和全局信息向量引导，实现多模态特征的动态融合，使模型能针对不同情感类别自适应调整参数，从而提升分类灵活性和泛化能力。在公开数据集上的实验验证了该方法的优越性。

title: 中国AI音乐，悄悄把全球第一拿走了
snippet: 昆仑万维Mureka V8，最新登顶Artificial Analysis音乐模型榜，一举超越Suno V4.5、Udio v1.5 Allegro等国际主流模型。 而且还是人声（vocal）、器乐（instrument）双料第一那种。
ai_summary: 昆仑万维Mureka V8模型在Artificial Analysis音乐模型榜单中登顶，在人声与器乐两项评测中均位列第一，超越了Suno V4.5、Udio v1.5 Allegro等国际主流模型。

title: WorkBuddy杀疯了？一群AI专家帮我打工，我在微信里当赛博虾工头！
snippet: 梦瑶 发自 凹非寺量子位 | 公众号 QbitAI 到底是谁说，给老板打工自己就当不成老板的？
ai_summary: 量子位公众号报道，有人质疑“给老板打工就无法成为老板”的观点，引发讨论。

title: 三颗“棋子”换750亿美元，马斯克编造“上市神话”
snippet: The Information刚刚披露的一则重磅消息，SpaceX计划最快于本周提交秘密IPO招股说明书，目标直指今年6月正式挂牌上市。 这不仅意味着美股历史上规模最大的上市交易即将诞生，更揭开了埃隆·马斯克近半年密集布下的“连环局”。
ai_summary: 据The Information报道，SpaceX计划最快本周提交秘密IPO招股说明书，目标于今年6月上市。此举有望成为美股史上最大规模上市交易，并揭示了马斯克近半年的战略布局。

title: 智能座舱交互趋势调查：消费者愿意为哪些功能买单？
snippet: 随着汽车智能化、数字化进程不断深入，人机界面（HMI）正成为汽车制造商争夺用户忠诚度的关键战场。当消费者坐进一辆全新汽车时，发动机参数已不再是首要关注点，面前那块醒目的触摸屏正成为新的注意力焦点。 S&P Global Mobility近期发布的2025年年度消费者调查，覆盖美国、英国、德国、中国、日本、韩国、印度和巴西8,023名车主，揭示了当前消费者对车载技术的真实偏好。从功能溢价意愿到界面操作习惯，再到技术接受度，用户的取舍之间，正悄然重塑未来智能座舱的设计方向。
ai_summary: 根据S&P Global Mobility对全球8,023名车主的调查，随着汽车智能化发展，人机界面（HMI）已成为影响用户忠诚度的关键。消费者对车载屏幕及技术的偏好，正显著重塑未来智能座舱的设计方向。

title: 人形机器人，还未“造福”先“造富”
snippet: 今年1月，关于“宇树科技IPO绿色通道被叫停”的消息刷屏社交平台，彼时消息称监管希望降温，机器人泡沫太大了。当外界以为宇树今年的上市计划将要落空时，事情峰回路转，3月20日，宇树首次公开发行股票并在科创板上市的招股说明书正式披露，上交所同日受理了其科创板IPO的申请。 2024年，宇树的估值尚处于约30亿至40亿元之间的波动区间内，而2025年借助春晚，宇树一举成名，并带火了人形机器人这个赛道，其身价一跃进入百亿区间。到了今年，从持续火热的市场热情及政策的利好来看，这个“人形机器人第一股”甚至有望冲刺1000亿元市值。
ai_summary: 宇树科技科创板IPO申请已于3月20日获受理。公司估值从2024年的30-40亿元，经历2025年春晚曝光后跃升至百亿级，目前市场预期其作为“人形机器人第一股”市值或有望冲击千亿元。

title: AgenticGEO: A Self-Evolving Agentic System for Generative Engine Optimization
snippet:
arXiv:2603.20213v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Generative search engines represent a transition from traditional ranking-based retrieval to Large Language Model (LLM)-based synthesis, transforming optimization goals from ranking prominence towards content inclusion. Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), specifically, aims to maximize visibility and attribution in black-box summarized outputs by strategically manipulating source content. However, existing methods rely on static heuristics, single-prompt optimization, or engine preference rule distillation that is prone to overfitting. They cannot flexibly adapt to diverse content or the changing behaviors of generative engines. Moreover, effectively optimizing these strategies requires an impractical amount of interaction feedback from the engines. To address these challenges, we propose AgenticGEO, a self-evolving agentic framework formulating optimization as a content-conditioned control problem, which enhances intrinsic content quality to robustly adapt to the unpredictable behaviors of black-box engines. Unlike fixed-strategy methods, AgenticGEO employs a MAP-Elites archive to evolve diverse, compositional strategies. To mitigate interaction costs, we introduce a Co-Evolving Critic, a lightweight surrogate that approximates engine feedback for content-specific strategy selection and refinement, efficiently guiding both evolutionary search and inference-time planning. Through extensive in-domain and cross-domain experiments on two representative engines, AgenticGEO achieves state-of-the-art performance and demonstrates robust transferability, outperforming 14 baselines across 3 datasets. Our code and model are available at: https://github.com/AIcling/agentic_geo.
ai_summary: 研究人员提出名为AgenticGEO的新型生成引擎优化框架，旨在提升内容在生成式搜索引擎中的可见度。该框架采用自进化代理机制，通过内容条件控制优化策略，并引入协同进化评估器来降低交互成本。实验表明，其在多个数据集上优于现有方法，展现出强大的适应性和迁移能力。

title: ProMAS: Proactive Error Forecasting for Multi-Agent Systems Using Markov Transition Dynamics
snippet:
arXiv:2603.20260v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The integration of Large Language Models into Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) has enabled the so-lution of complex, long-horizon tasks through collaborative reasoning. However, this collec-tive intelligence is inherently fragile, as a single logical fallacy can rapidly propagate and lead to system-wide failure. Most current research re-lies on post-hoc failure analysis, thereby hinder-ing real-time intervention. To address this, we propose PROMAS, a proactive framework utiliz-ing Markov transitions for predictive error anal-ysis. PROMAS extracts Causal Delta Features to capture semantic displacement, mapping them to a quantized Vector Markov Space to model reasoning as probabilistic transitions. By inte-grating a Proactive Prediction Head with Jump Detection, the method localizes errors via risk acceleration rather than static thresholds. On the Who&When benchmark, PROMAS achieves 22.97% step-level accuracy while processing only 27% of reasoning logs. This performance rivals reactive monitors like MASC while reducing data overhead by 73%. Although this strategy entails an accuracy trade-off compared to post-hoc meth-ods, it significantly improves intervention latency, balancing diagnostic precision with the real-time demands of autonomous reasoning.
ai_summary: 大型语言模型在多智能体系统中的协作推理存在逻辑谬误快速传播的风险。现有研究多依赖事后分析，难以实时干预。为此，研究团队提出PROMAS框架，通过马尔可夫转移进行预测性错误分析，利用因果增量特征和量化向量空间建模推理过程。该框架在Who&When基准测试中仅需处理27%的推理日志即可达到22.97%的步骤准确率，在降低73%数据开销的同时显著提升了干预时效性。

title: Domain-Specialized Tree of Thought through Plug-and-Play Predictors
snippet:
arXiv:2603.20267v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced complex reasoning, prominent methods like the Tree of Thoughts (ToT) framework face a critical trade-off between exploration depth and computational efficiency. Existing ToT implementations often rely on heavyweight LLM-based self-evaluation or rigid heuristics for branch pruning, making them prohibitively expensive and inflexible for broad application. To address this, we introduce DST, an adaptable, plug-and-play predictor that serves as a lightweight, supervised heuristic to guide the ToT search process. Our predictor enables dynamic, context-aware pruning, allowing the search to proceed with near-greedy efficiency on simpler reasoning steps while adaptively expanding the search beam only when encountering uncertainty or task complexity. We evaluate our approach on a diverse suite of benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, general reasoning, and complex logical reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves accuracy competitive with or superior to strong baselines, including standard ToT, while reducing computational overhead by 26-75%. Our work effectively resolves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off in tree-based reasoning, transforming ToT from a resource-intensive technique into a scalable and practical paradigm for complex problem-solving in LLMs.
ai_summary: 研究人员提出一种名为DST的轻量级预测器，用于优化大语言模型中的思维树推理框架。该方法通过动态剪枝策略，在保持或提升数学、逻辑等复杂推理任务准确率的同时，将计算开销降低26%-75%，有效解决了传统方法在探索深度与计算效率之间的权衡难题。

title: LeCun的世界模型单GPU就能跑了
snippet: LeCun世界模型最新进展，开源了一套极简训练方案，单GPU就能跑。 这套方案叫LeWorldModel，它基于JEPA架构，实现像素输入直接预测未来，速度快到离谱，完整规划仅需1秒。
ai_summary: LeCun团队开源了名为LeWorldModel的世界模型训练方案。该方案基于JEPA架构，可直接从像素输入预测未来，训练仅需单GPU，且规划速度极快，完整规划仅需1秒。

title: 又一华为天才少年入局具身创业！用视频生成数据训家用机器人，首个模型登顶具身基模榜单
snippet: 最新模型在Embodied Arena登顶 6G冲浪的量子位最新发现，去年从华为诺亚方舟实验室转入学界的周凯文，在入职港中文不到半年后，悄然更新了个人主页。
ai_summary: 港中文研究员周凯文更新个人主页，其最新模型在Embodied Arena平台取得领先成绩。

title: 阿里在海外上了个“企业级龙虾”，我用它30分钟手搓了一家网店
snippet: 30分钟，我用阿里凌晨在海外刚上线的“企业版龙虾”，开了家网店。 剩下的活它就会自动帮我干，而且最终效果还不赖：
ai_summary: 阿里新推出的“企业版龙虾”工具，可帮助用户在30分钟内快速开设网店，并自动完成后续运营工作，效果良好。

title: 油价上涨，电车车主们又“优越”了一回
snippet: 3月23日，在股市暴跌这天，“喜提”油价上涨，炒股的油车车主经历了一次“双重暴击”。 近期，受美以伊冲突加剧影响，国际市场原油价格大幅上涨，国内油价水涨船高。为了赶在油价上涨前加满油，近日来，多地加油站出现排长队加油的情况。
ai_summary: 3月23日，受国际原油价格上涨影响，国内油价上调。多地车主为赶在涨价前加油，在加油站排起长队。

title: 被AI“偷走”声音？一线配音演员集体向AI侵权宣战
snippet: 今年3月起，边江工作室、729声工场、音熊联萌等头部机构旗下配音演员集体发布维权声明，控诉部分机构及个人在未经授权的情况下，擅自使用他们的声音。 边江工作室旗下配音演员史泽鲲，更是直接委托律师正式提起诉讼，并留下邮箱收集侵权的作品。
ai_summary: 今年3月起，多家头部配音机构及演员集体维权，指控部分机构及个人未经授权擅自使用其声音。其中，配音演员史泽鲲已委托律师正式提起诉讼，并公开邮箱收集侵权证据。

title: DeepMind创始人传记作者马拉比：不要让机器替你做所有事，新的工作机会在人际连接里
snippet: 知名科技史学家、金融史学家塞巴斯蒂安·马拉比至今对华为总部的参访记忆深刻。 3月初，他从伦敦辗转而来，在深圳华为园区坐上了一辆自动驾驶电动车。15分钟的行程里，他乘坐的车辆自动检测到停在前方的维修车，随即减速、等待，最后平稳切换到另一条车道行驶。
ai_summary: 知名科技史学家塞巴斯蒂安·马拉比近期参访深圳华为总部，亲身体验了园区内的自动驾驶技术。在15分钟的行程中，他所乘坐的车辆成功识别前方障碍物，并自主完成减速、等待及平稳变道等一系列操作。
